description_long: This lamppost features a robust, vertical wooden post with a perpendicular horizontal arm extending from the top, forming a T-shape. The base is encased in a solid, dark-colored material, likely concrete, providing stability and durability for outdoor environments. Suspended from the end of the horizontal arm is a single lantern-style lamp head, which is angular and enclosed in a black metal frame with frosted glass panels. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The wood appears to be treated for weather resistance, and the lamp head is securely attached with a metal bracket. This lamppost is suitable for parks, sidewalks, or residential pathways, offering both illumination and a subtle, modern aesthetic.
description: A T-shaped wooden lamppost with a single black lantern-style lamp head, mounted on a sturdy concrete base. The design is minimalist and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full T-shaped structure, with the lamp head hanging to the right and the concrete base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lamp head's angular shape and the thickness of the wooden post, with the lamp centered in the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the lamp head now hanging to the left and the concrete base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the lamp head and the depth of the wooden post, with the concrete base in the foreground.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Angular lantern-style lamp head with black metal frame and frosted glass panels
